title: SQL: conversion from decimal to varchar error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL NOT NULL);
SELECT id, CAST(value AS TEXT) FROM test_table WHERE value > 10.0;
CREATE TABLE another_table (description TEXT, amount REAL);
INSERT INTO another_table (description, amount) VALUES ('Test', NULL);
key_bug_features: casting decimal to varchar in SQL query
